name: kinhluan/skills
description: Diagnostic frameworks for engineering teams: DORA delivery audit, DDD domain modeling, C4 architecture mapping, Rogers Diffusion release tracking. For engineers who need to close the gap between code quality and business outcomes.

skills.description: Federated learning with Deep Q-Networks for privacy-preserving optimization. Domain-specific skill — only route when user explicitly mentions federated learning, FL, DQN, or privacy-preserving distributed RL.

skills.name: internal-critique

skills.description: Closing ritual for all workflows. Extract lessons, compress into Rule/Stratagem format, and store in appropriate memory tier. Trigger after PhD milestones, MVP releases, Ngũ Sự assessments, and major dev tasks.

skills.name: why-strategic-rationale
skills.description: Strategic rationale via Value Proposition Canvas + Amazon Working Backwards PR/FAQ. Use when evaluating product ideas, justifying initiatives, or preparing pitch documents.

skills.name: kinhluan-router
skills.description: Central dispatcher for the kinhluan skills ecosystem. Detects workflow stage (PhD/MVP/Ngũ Sự/Tech), artifact existence, and intent to route to the correct skill.

skills.name: agent-expertise-protocol
